scripts.tauri:dev:win: pnpm run check:tauri-cli-native && tauri dev --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.tauri:dev:mac: pnpm run check:tauri-cli-native && tauri dev --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.tauri:dev:linux: pnpm run check:tauri-cli-native && tauri dev --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.tauri:build:win: pnpm run check:tauri-cli-native && tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.tauri:build:win-arm: pnpm run check:tauri-cli-native && tauri build --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.tauri:build:mac: pnpm run check:tauri-cli-native && tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.tauri:build:mac-intel: pnpm run check:tauri-cli-native && tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.tauri:build:linux: pnpm run check:tauri-cli-native && tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.tauri:build:linux-arm: pnpm run check:tauri-cli-native && tauri build --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
